local-planner.description: Top-level Local Planner and Deep Reasoning Engine. Employs advanced chain-of-thought distillation to orchestrate architecture layouts, break down complex logic requirements, and cross-examine system blueprints. Do not write implementation code directly—delegate system design to @local-architect, direct programming to @local-coder, and swift executions to @local-plan-executor.

local-architect.description: Senior Local System Architect. Employs Thinking Mode for unconstrained code architecture, systemic refactoring, design pattern modeling, and deep code reviews. Delegate active feature development to @local-coder and automated tool integration to @local-tool-agent.

local-coder.description: Core Local Programmer. Employs precision Thinking Mode for generating codebase features, complex algorithmic implementation, deep debugging, and native script building. Delegate raw code generation from finalized plans to @local-plan-executor.

local-instruct.description: Fast Local Conversation Worker. Thinking disabled for instant, low-latency discussions, explanation of structural frameworks, general text formatting, and direct Q&A.

local-tool-agent.description: Frictionless Local Execution subagent. Thinking disabled for low-latency JSON payload manipulation, multi-turn function calling, workspace indexing, and fast API integration tasks.

local-plan-executor.description: Deterministic Local Code Writer. Low temperature and thinking disabled to prevent editorial drift. Optimized strictly for processing complex architectural blueprints and planner specs directly into exact file components.

cloud-kimi.description: Ultimate Cloud Architect and Senior Coder. Use for the most complex system tasks, heavy reasoning, and top-tier code design. Delegate standard software development tasks to @cloud-deepseek and simple utilities, file searches, or easy lookups to @cloud-instruct.

cloud-deepseek.description: Senior Cloud Developer and excellent coder. Use for core feature building, implementation design, and heavy programming tasks. Delegate low-complexity tasks, file search, and routine code exploration to @cloud-instruct.

cloud-instruct.description: Ultra-cheap Cloud Subagent. Use strictly for easy tasks, raw file searching, codebase indexing, and basic instructions that require zero deep reasoning or heavy logic.
